utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay ! So , we will just stay married .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: And I will make everyone call me Mrs . Geller !

emotion_cause.span: 3_And I will make everyone call me Mrs . Geller !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Wow ! This is so amazing . I uh , I really thought I would have to talk you into this more .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: What ... wh ... what so we will just stay married forever ? !

emotion_cause.span: 5_so we will just stay married forever ? !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Okay , look , how is this gonna affect you ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_so we will just stay married forever ? !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I mean you fill some form out once and a while and instead of checking the box that says Ms you check the box that says Mrs . !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: It is right next to it !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I am asking you to do me a favor .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: You are asking me to be your wife !

emotion_cause.span: 14_You are asking me to be your wife !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: And as my wife I think you should grant me this favor .
